'''Commando recon droids''', or '''Recces''', were specialized reconnaissance and [[Probe droid/Legends|probe droids]] used by [[Clone commando/Legends|clone commandos]] and [[Advanced Recon Commando/Legends|ARC troopers]] during the [[Clone Wars/Legends|Clone Wars]].

==Appearances==
*{{CW|3}} {{1st}}
*{{Tales|22|Honor Bound}} {{Flash}}
*''[[Republic Commando: Hard Contact]]''
*''[[Order 66: A Republic Commando Novel]]''
*''[[Labyrinth of Evil]]''
